_meta.description: DashLink demo dataset — 200 e-commerce orders, Jan 2024 – Apr 2026

fields.order_date: ISO date — use as Line chart X axis or Date Range filter
fields.category: string  — product category (8 values) — use as Bar/Pie X axis or Select filter
fields.region: string  — sales region (5 values) — use as Pie category or MultiSelect filter
fields.sales_channel: string  — Online / In-Store / Mobile App / Marketplace — Select filter
fields.status: string  — completed / pending / refunded / cancelled — MultiSelect filter
fields.payment_method: string  — Credit Card / Debit Card / PayPal / Bank Transfer — Select filter
fields.revenue: number  — line item revenue in USD — KPI sum, Line Y axis
fields.units_sold: number  — units in order — KPI sum / avg
fields.discount_pct: number  — discount % 0-30 — Number Range filter, KPI avg
fields.cost: number  — cost of goods — KPI sum
fields.profit: number  — revenue - cost — Bar chart Y axis, KPI sum
fields.rating: number|null — product rating 1.0-5.0 (10% null) — KPI avg, Number Range filter
